_meta.name: merged-lines-knowledge
_meta.purpose: 4线合并数据层（Vedic9/满月12/HD5/IChing8），并入现有栏目非独立开线
_meta.evidence_tier: 公开体系通识(确证): Vedic=印度占星Navagraha/满月=Native farmer almanac传统/HD=Ra Uru Hu 1987/IChing=汉易八卦
_meta.caveat: 水晶配伍为现代关联非各体系原生传统；各线受众/重叠/意图混淆 caveat 见各条；非预测(reflection framework)

vedic.title: Sun (Surya) in Vedic Astrology: Meaning & Crystal
vedic.definition: In Vedic astrology (Jyotish), Surya the Sun represents the soul, ego, vitality, and father. Its gem is Ruby.

steps: Sun's sign placement in your Vedic chart
ruby traditionally worn in gold on ring finger

faq_seeds: What does Sun represent in Vedic astrology?
vedic.caveat: 受众错配: Vedic用户买贵宝石Ruby ring非水晶手链；garnet/citrine为水晶替代非原典

vedic.title: Moon (Chandra) in Vedic Astrology: Meaning & Crystal
vedic.definition: Chandra the Moon governs mind, emotions, mother, and instincts in Vedic astrology. Its gem is Pearl.

steps: Moon sign (Chandra Lagna) is primary in Vedic
pearl in silver on little finger

faq_seeds: What does Moon represent in Vedic?
vedic.caveat: 受众错配; moonstone为水晶替代Pearl

vedic.title: Mars (Mangal) in Vedic Astrology: Meaning & Crystal
vedic.definition: Mangal (Mars) rules energy, courage, siblings, and land in Vedic astrology. Its gem is Red Coral.

steps: red coral in gold on ring finger

faq_seeds: What does Mars represent in Vedic?
vedic.caveat: 受众错配; carnelian替代Red Coral

vedic.title: Mercury (Budha) in Vedic Astrology: Meaning & Crystal
vedic.definition: Budha (Mercury) governs intellect, communication, commerce in Vedic astrology. Its gem is Emerald.

steps: Mercury strong in chart aids intellect
emerald in gold on little finger

faq_seeds: What does Mercury represent in Vedic?

vedic.title: Jupiter (Guru) in Vedic Astrology: Meaning & Crystal
vedic.definition: Guru/Brihaspati (Jupiter) represents wisdom, wealth, children, dharma in Vedic astrology. Its gem is Yellow Sapphire.

steps: Jupiter is most benefic in Vedic
yellow sapphire in gold on index finger

faq_seeds: What does Jupiter represent in Vedic?
vedic.caveat: 受众错配; citrine替代Yellow Sapphire

vedic.title: Venus (Shukra) in Vedic Astrology: Meaning & Crystal
vedic.definition: Shukra (Venus) rules love, beauty, luxury, relationships in Vedic astrology. Its gem is Diamond.
faq_seeds: What does Venus represent in Vedic?

vedic.title: Saturn (Shani) in Vedic Astrology: Meaning & Crystal
vedic.definition: Shani (Saturn) governs discipline, karma, longevity, hardship in Vedic astrology. Its gem is Blue Sapphire.

steps: Saturn's Sade Sati is a 7.5yr transit

faq_seeds: What does Saturn represent in Vedic?
vedic.caveat: 受众错配; lapis替代Blue Sapphire

vedic.title: Rahu in Vedic Astrology: Meaning & Crystal
vedic.definition: Rahu, a shadow planet in Vedic astrology, represents obsession, material desire, foreign things. Its gem is Hessonite.
vedic.caveat: 受众错配; 现代水晶替代

vedic.title: Ketu in Vedic Astrology: Meaning & Crystal
vedic.definition: Ketu, Rahu's counterpart, rules spirituality, detachment, past lives, moksha in Vedic astrology. Its gem is Cat's Eye.
vedic.caveat: 受众错配; tiger-eye替代Cat's Eye

moonphase.title: Wolf Moon (January): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Wolf Moon is the January full moon, named for hungry wolves howling in midwinter. Symbolizes endurance and community.
faq_seeds: Why is it called Wolf Moon?
moonphase.caveat: 月光净化已在cleansing; 此为满月名寓意增量

moonphase.title: Snow Moon (February): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Snow Moon is February's full moon, named for heavy snowfall. Symbolizes stillness and preparation.

moonphase.title: Worm Moon (March): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Worm Moon is March's full moon, when earthworms signal thawing soil. Symbolizes renewal and emergence.

moonphase.title: Pink Moon (April): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Pink Moon is April's full moon, named for moss pink wildflower. Symbolizes new growth and optimism.

moonphase.title: Flower Moon (May): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Flower Moon is May's full moon, when flowers abound. Symbolizes blossoming and fertility.

moonphase.title: Strawberry Moon (June): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Strawberry Moon is June's full moon, marking strawberry harvest. Symbolizes sweetness and gratitude.

moonphase.title: Buck Moon (July): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Buck Moon is July's full moon, when deer antlers regrow. Symbolizes strength and renewal.

moonphase.title: Sturgeon Moon (August): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Sturgeon Moon is August's full moon, named for abundant lake sturgeon. Symbolizes abundance and depth.

moonphase.title: Harvest Moon (September): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Harvest Moon is the full moon nearest the autumn equinox, lighting late harvests. Symbolizes reaping and gratitude.

moonphase.title: Hunter's Moon (October): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Hunter's Moon follows the Harvest Moon, when hunters stocked provisions. Symbolizes preparation and provision.

moonphase.title: Beaver Moon (November): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Beaver Moon is November's full moon, when beavers prepare for winter. Symbolizes diligence and preparation.

moonphase.title: Cold Moon (December): Meaning & Crystals
moonphase.definition: The Cold Moon is December's full moon, marking long cold nights. Symbolizes rest, introspection, and the return of light.

humandesign.title: Generator Type in Human Design: Meaning & Crystals
humandesign.definition: Generators (about 37% of people) are the life-force workers of Human Design, designed to find satisfaction through response and sustained work.
faq_seeds: What is a Generator in Human Design?
humandesign.caveat: 术语意图混淆: HD里'Crystal'是术语(Design Crystal)非矿物; 水晶配伍为modern association

humandesign.title: Manifestor Type in Human Design: Meaning & Crystals
humandesign.definition: Manifestors (about 9%) are initiators meant to start things and impact others, requiring freedom and informing before action.
humandesign.caveat: 术语混淆; 水晶modern association

humandesign.title: Projector Type in Human Design: Meaning & Crystals
humandesign.definition: Projectors (about 20%) are guides meant to lead and advise others, succeeding through recognition and waiting for invitation.
humandesign.caveat: 术语混淆; 水晶modern association

humandesign.title: Reflector Type in Human Design: Meaning & Crystals
humandesign.definition: Reflectors (about 1%) are rare mirrors of their community, sampling energies through all open centers, needing a lunar cycle for decisions.
humandesign.caveat: 术语混淆; 水晶modern association

humandesign.title: Human Design Types: Complete Guide to the 4 Types
humandesign.definition: Human Design has 4 main types (Generator, Manifestor, Projector, Reflector) plus Manifesting Generator, each with a distinct strategy and aura.
faq_seeds: What are the Human Design types?
How do I find my type?
humandesign.caveat: 术语混淆; 水晶modern association

iching.title: Qian (Heaven) Trigram: I Ching Meaning & Crystal
iching.definition: Qian (☰), the Creative Heaven trigram in I Ching, represents yang energy, strength, leadership, and initiate action.
iching.caveat: 意图混淆: I Ching工具站混; 8卦寓意确证

iching.title: Dui (Lake) Trigram: I Ching Meaning & Crystal
iching.definition: Dui (☱), the Joyous Lake trigram, represents joy, communication, and openness.
iching.caveat: 意图混淆; 寓意确证

iching.title: Li (Fire) Trigram: I Ching Meaning & Crystal
iching.definition: Li (☲), the Clinging Fire trigram, represents clarity, illumination, and awareness.
iching.caveat: 意图混淆; 寓意确证

iching.title: Zhen (Thunder) Trigram: I Ching Meaning & Crystal
iching.definition: Zhen (☳), the Arousing Thunder trigram, represents initiative, awakening, and new beginnings.
iching.caveat: 意图混淆; 寓意确证

iching.title: Xun (Wind) Trigram: I Ching Meaning & Crystal
iching.definition: Xun (☴), the Gentle Wind trigram, represents flexibility, penetration, and steady influence.
iching.caveat: 意图混淆; 寓意确证

iching.title: Kan (Water) Trigram: I Ching Meaning & Crystal
iching.definition: Kan (☵), the Abysmal Water trigram, represents danger, depth, and the unknown, but also wisdom through challenge.
iching.caveat: 意图混淆; 寓意确证

iching.title: Gen (Mountain) Trigram: I Ching Meaning & Crystal
iching.definition: Gen (☶), the Keeping Still Mountain trigram, represents stillness, meditation, and resting.
iching.caveat: 意图混淆; 寓意确证

iching.title: Kun (Earth) Trigram: I Ching Meaning & Crystal
iching.definition: Kun (☷), the Receptive Earth trigram, represents yin energy, receptivity, nourishment, and patience.
iching.caveat: 意图混淆; 寓意确证
